hero.subtitle: Receptio turns every call into an opportunity. An intelligent receptionist available 24/7 — so you never miss what matters.

how.title: From call to summary
how.step1_desc: Your number rings. No matter the time, no matter the day — Receptio is always available.
how.step2_desc: In under 2 seconds, your virtual receptionist greets the caller with your personalised message.
how.step3_desc: The call is analysed, qualified, and routed to the right person according to your business rules.
how.step4_desc: Your team receives a full summary — transcript, suggested actions, priority level.

demo.title: Watch Receptio
demo.subtitle: Simulate an inbound call and see your AI receptionist handle it live.
demo.receptio_line2: How can I help you today?
demo.caller_line1: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for next Thursday if possible.
demo.receptio_line3: Of course. May I have your name and the reason for your visit?
demo.caller_line2: I'm Thomas Renard, it's for an initial consultation.
demo.receptio_line4: Perfect, Mr Renard. I'll log your request and notify the team right away.
demo.summary_content: Appointment request — Thomas Renard — Thursday, initial consultation. Priority: normal. Action required: confirm time slot.

features.title: Build your
features.subtitle: Two core plans and an ecosystem of modules to customise every aspect of your phone reception.
features.core_a_desc: The power of professional reception, without artificial intelligence. Auto-pickup, voicemail, call transfer.
features.core_b_desc: Natural language understanding, contextual responses, and continuous learning powered by cutting-edge AI.
features.modules_subtitle: Activate only what you need. Stack, combine, customise.
features.module_smart_routing_desc: Distribute calls based on skills and availability.
features.module_recording_desc: Archive every conversation for training and compliance.
features.module_email_summary_desc: Receive a structured email after each call with key points.
features.module_sms_summary_desc: A concise summary sent directly to your phone.
features.module_appointments_desc: Calendar sync to schedule directly during the call.
features.module_green_desc: Infrastructure 100% powered by certified renewable energy.
features.module_manual_routing_desc: Full control over call distribution in real time.
features.module_analytics_global_desc: Unified dashboard to drive your reception performance.
features.module_analytics_micro_desc: Individual KPI tracking for each member of your team.

roi.title: How much does Receptio
roi.subtitle: 3 questions. Instant result. An informed decision.
roi.result_subtitle: Based on an average hourly cost of €35/h
roi.disclaimer: Indicative estimate. Actual results vary depending on your sector and organisation.

pricing.title: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Start with a core plan and add the modules you need.
pricing.modules_subtitle: Activate and stack modules of your choice.
pricing.contact_cta: Got a custom project? Let's talk →

testimonials.title: Companies that
testimonials.t1_quote: Since Receptio, we haven't missed a single call. The team can finally focus on what really matters.
testimonials.t2_quote: The ROI simulator convinced me in 30 seconds. We save the equivalent of a part-time salary just from qualified calls.
testimonials.t3_quote: The interface is remarkably elegant. And most importantly it works. Our clients love the greeting message.
testimonials.t4_quote: We were choosing between hiring and Receptio. We chose Receptio. It was the right call.

story.title: Born from frustration,
story.intro: Receptio was born from a simple observation: too many businesses lose clients for lack of phone availability. We decided to change that.
story.year1_desc: An entrepreneur misses an important call. He imagines a solution. The founding team forms around a shared vision: making professional telephony accessible to every business.
story.year2_desc: First internal tests. The first call is answered by Receptio. The AI qualifies, summarises, notifies. In 1.8 seconds. The team knows it's possible.
story.year3_desc: Beta version released. The first clients adopt the solution. Their feedback shapes the product week after week.
story.year4_desc: 5,000+ businesses trust Receptio. European expansion. The mission continues: being the link between every business and its outside world.

cta.title: Your next call
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses that chose Receptio to transform their phone reception.
cta.note: No credit card required · 14-day free trial

footer.tagline: The link between your business and the outside world.
